top_signals.title: Dollar Jumps on Haven Flows as Middle East War Intensifies
top_signals.summary: The dollar got a boost Thursday from haven flows as the war in the Middle East intensified, pushing oil prices above $100 a barrel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil price surge drives global bond sell-off
top_signals.summary: Brent crude’s rise above $100 threatens a prolonged surge in inflation and resetting interest rate expectations
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Treasury Yields Rise to 2026 Highs as Oil Gains Spark Fed Bet - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Treasury Yields Rise to 2026 Highs as Oil Gains Spark Fed Bet  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Heathrow boss warns Burnham against Budget raid after hub’s tax bill doubles
top_signals.summary: The boss of Heathrow has warned Andy Burnham against using business as a cash cow at his maiden Budget this autumn, after the airport’s tax bill more than doubled in the space of a year. Thomas Woldbye said the aviation sector is one of the most heavily taxed industries in Britain, and that uptick in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tech reporter Joanna Stern asked AI to do 'almost everything' for a year—the No. 1 tool she'll keep using
top_signals.summary: "I Am Not a Robot" author Joanna Stern integrated dozens of AI applications into her life over the course of a year. She says this one has stuck with her.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trainspotting the Musical: A bad, bad trip down memory lane
top_signals.summary: Trainspotting the Musical | Theatre Royal Haymarket | ★☆☆☆☆  I was 13 when Danny Boyle’s Trainspotting adaptation was released – I’d never seen anything like it and it became a seminal text of my teenage years.
